responses: Hello! I am the AI Registration Assistant. I can help you register or answer internship questions. Type 'register' to begin.
Great! Let us begin your registration.
This is a free online AI and Data Science internship by Data Alcott Systems. The project is completed remotely and focuses on practical AI, NLP, and machine-learning skills.
Students and beginners interested in AI, data science, Python, or software development can apply. Basic computer knowledge is enough to start.
Basic Python is helpful. This project uses Python, NLTK, scikit-learn, Flask, HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and JSON storage.
For this demonstration, no document upload is required. Enter valid personal and academic details and keep your GitHub, report, screenshots, and demo video ready for task submission.
The task description identifies this as a free online internship. No payment is collected by this chatbot.
After completing the registration flow, the assistant generates a registration ID and stores your details in a local JSON file.
Submit a public GitHub repository, YouTube demonstration, project report, at least five screenshots, and a blog post under the 'Task Submit' category with your GitHub and YouTube links.
I can register you and answer questions about eligibility, fees, required skills, internship details, status, and submission. Type 'register' to start or 'cancel' to stop an active registration.
You are welcome! Type 'register' whenever you are ready to apply.

patterns: tell me about your project features
responses: This project includes machine-learning intent classification, entity extraction, email validation, dialog-state management, JSON storage, sentiment logging, a Flask web interface, and an admin analytics dashboard.
Goodbye! Best wishes for your AI and Data Science internship.
